chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI Criminal Bail Application No. 855 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For hearing of MA No. 7730/2022 13.07.2022 Mr. Altaf Ahmed advocate along with applicant/surety Syed Meeral Shah Bukhari Addl. P.G -.-.-.-.-.-.-. The applicant/surety has sought for return of surety papers (Defense Saving Certificates worth Rs.100,000/-) for the reason that those are no more required by this court, after dismissal of very bail application, which is not opposed by learned Addl. P.G for the state. Consequently, office is directed to return the surety papers (Defense Saving Certificates) to the applicant/surety after proper verification and identification. The listed application is disposed of accordingly. JUDGE
